title: aristida correlliae
intro: Aristida correlliae, also known as Correll's three-awn grass, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. Aristida correlliae has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of Aristida correlliae include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
